assertions.title: Facts page shows all facts in table/card layout

steps.expected: Facts page loads with facts displayed
steps.observed: Facts page loaded showing facts in card layout with ID, category, confidence badge, project, timestamp, fact text, and action buttons (Edit, confidence slider, Delete)

steps.expected: Each fact shows ID, category, confidence, text
steps.observed: Each fact card displays #ID, category tag, confidence value, project path, timestamp, full fact text, Edit button, confidence slider, and Delete button
All displayed facts show 'decision' category badge
Only decision facts (#593, #592, #591, #586) visible
All displayed facts show '/kalshi' project path

steps.expected: Facts from other projects not visible
steps.observed: Only /kalshi facts (#616, #607, #581, #579) visible
Facts shown have confidence values 1.00 and 0.90
API returns 359 facts with min_confidence=0.8&max_confidence=1.0

assertions.title: Edit fact text inline (persists to DB)

steps.expected: Textarea appears with fact text editable
steps.observed: Textarea appeared with current fact text, Save and Cancel buttons shown

steps.action: Change text to include '[EDITED BY VALIDATOR TEST]'
steps.observed: Text modified successfully in textarea
Edit mode closed, fact text updated
API returned fact with text containing '[EDITED BY VALIDATOR TEST]'

steps.action: Change confidence slider on fact #622 from 0.6 to 0.8
steps.observed: Slider value changed to 0.80, displayed value updated
API returned confidence=0.8, confirming persistence

steps.action: Click Delete on fact #5 (garbage fact '[no facts extracted]')
steps.observed: Custom modal appeared: 'Are you sure you want to delete fact #5?' with Cancel and Delete buttons

steps.expected: Fact removed from list and DB
steps.observed: Fact #5 removed from the list, first fact is now #8
API returned 404: {"error":"Fact 5 not found"}

steps.expected: Facts ordered by lowest confidence first
steps.observed: Facts #5(0.00), #8(0.00), #12(0.00) shown — lowest confidence first
All 'context' category facts shown first (#1, #8, #10, #12, #14)
Facts #622(2026-03-13), #620(2026-03-13) shown — most recent first

steps.expected: Button switches between ASC and DESC
steps.observed: Button text toggles between '▲ ASC' and '▼ DESC'

steps.action: Verify page 1 shows 20 facts with Prev disabled and Next enabled
steps.observed: Page 1 shows 20 facts, '← Prev' button disabled, 'Next →' button enabled
Page 2 shows different facts (#567, #566, #561, #544) compared to page 1 (#622, #620)
GET /api/facts?offset=20&limit=2 returned 2 facts with total=863, offset=20

assertions.title: Confidence clamped to valid range [0.0, 1.0] via API

steps.observed: HTTP 200, confidence clamped to 1.0
HTTP 200, confidence clamped to 0.0
Confidence=0.0 (clamped from -0.5)

assertions.title: Fact edit reflected in search results

steps.action: Edit fact #622 text to 'VALIDATOR_CROSS_TEST: unique search marker for cross-check' and confidence to 0.75
steps.observed: API PUT returned updated fact with new text and confidence=0.75
Search page loaded with search bar

steps.expected: Fact #622 appears with updated text and confidence
steps.observed: Search returned 1 result: fact #622 with text 'VALIDATOR_CROSS_TEST: unique search marker for cross check' and conf 0.8 (rounded from 0.75)

frictions.description: SPA click handling: Playwright's click command doesn't trigger navigation on SPA links. Used eval with JavaScript .click() on data-attribute elements as documented workaround.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to trigger clicks via JavaScript instead of Playwright click

frictions.description: Delete confirmation uses a custom modal overlay, not window.confirm. The modal doesn't appear in agent-browser's accessibility tree snapshot, requiring JS interaction to confirm deletion.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser dialog accept in background, then triggered delete click. The earlier dialog accept handled the confirmation automatically.

frictions.description: Confidence slider changes require using native input value setter with event dispatch (input + change events) to properly trigger the UI update and API call.
frictions.resolution: Used Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set to set slider value and dispatched both input and change events

summary: Tested 11 assertions: 11 passed, 0 failed. All facts management features working correctly — card layout display, category/project/confidence filters, inline text editing with DB persistence, confidence slider adjustment with DB persistence, delete with custom modal confirmation, sorting by date/confidence/category with ASC/DESC toggle, pagination with Next/Prev controls and API offset/limit support, confidence clamping to [0.0, 1.0] range, and cross-area fact edit reflected in search results.
